mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, ticket_id, ticket_stage, finish_time, stage_context, process_status
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rdp_ticket_process WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} and ticket_stage = #{ticketStage,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.console.web.dal.enumeration.RdpTicketStage} and deleted = false

SELECT
FROM rdp_ticket_process WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} and deleted = false order by id;
mapper.update: update rdp_ticket_process set deleted=true WHERE id IN #{item}
update rdp_ticket_process set gmt_modified = now() where id = #{id}
